---
title: "B | Thema 8"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## Bifaktor-Modell vs. korrelierte Faktoren

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(psych))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")
 
View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```

### Präsentation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(lavaan)
library(semTools) 
library(lavaanPlot)

data(bfi, package = "psych")
dat <- bfi[complete.cases(bfi[, 1:25]), 1:25]

# Umpolen
dat$A1 <- 7 - dat$A1
dat$C4 <- 7 - dat$C4; dat$C5 <- 7 - dat$C5
dat$E1 <- 7 - dat$E1; dat$E2 <- 7 - dat$E2
dat$O2 <- 7 - dat$O2; dat$O5 <- 7 - dat$O5

# ---- PRÄSENTATION: Bifaktor-Modell ----

# Modell 1: Korrelierte 5 Faktoren
model_corr <- '
  A =~ A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5
  C =~ C1 + C2 + C3 + C4 + C5
  E =~ E1 + E2 + E3 + E4 + E5
  N =~ N1 + N2 + N3 + N4 + N5
  O =~ O1 + O2 + O3 + O4 + O5
'
fit_corr <- cfa(model_corr, data = dat)

# Modell 2: Bifaktor-Modell (g + 5 spezifische Faktoren)
model_bifac <- '
  # Allgemeiner Faktor (g)
  g =~ A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5 +
       C1 + C2 + C3 + C4 + C5 +
       E1 + E2 + E3 + E4 + E5 +
       N1 + N2 + N3 + N4 + N5 +
       O1 + O2 + O3 + O4 + O5

  # Spezifische Gruppenfaktoren (orthogonal zu g und zueinander)
  A_s =~ A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5
  C_s =~ C1 + C2 + C3 + C4 + C5
  E_s =~ E1 + E2 + E3 + E4 + E5
  N_s =~ N1 + N2 + N3 + N4 + N5
  O_s =~ O1 + O2 + O3 + O4 + O5
'
fit_bifac <- cfa(model_bifac, data = dat, orthogonal = TRUE)

# Fit-Vergleich
cat("=== Fit-Vergleich ===\n")
comp <- data.frame(
  Modell = c("Korrelierte Faktoren", "Bifaktor"),
  chisq = c(fitMeasures(fit_corr, "chisq"), fitMeasures(fit_bifac, "chisq")),
  df = c(fitMeasures(fit_corr, "df"), fitMeasures(fit_bifac, "df")),
  CFI = c(fitMeasures(fit_corr, "cfi"), fitMeasures(fit_bifac, "cfi")),
  RMSEA = c(fitMeasures(fit_corr, "rmsea"), fitMeasures(fit_bifac, "rmsea")),
  AIC = c(fitMeasures(fit_corr, "aic"), fitMeasures(fit_bifac, "aic"))
)
comp[, -1] <- round(comp[, -1], 3)
print(comp)

# Pfaddiagramm Bifaktor

lavaanPlot(model = fit_bifac,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE)
 
# Standardisierte Ladungen
cat("\n=== Ladungen auf g-Faktor ===\n")
ss <- standardizedSolution(fit_bifac)
g_loadings <- ss[ss$op == "=~" & ss$lhs == "g", c("rhs", "est.std")]
g_loadings$est.std <- round(g_loadings$est.std, 3)
print(g_loadings, row.names = FALSE)

```

## Bericht

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ---- BERICHT: ωh, ωs und ECV berechnen ----

# Hierarchisches Omega (ωh): Wie viel reliable Varianz erklärt g?
# ECV (Explained Common Variance): Anteil g an der gemeinsamen Varianz

# Ladungen extrahieren
all_loadings <- ss[ss$op == "=~", c("lhs", "rhs", "est.std")]
g_lam <- all_loadings$est.std[all_loadings$lhs == "g"]

specific_factors <- c("A_s", "C_s", "E_s", "N_s", "O_s")
s_lam <- list()
for (sf in specific_factors) {
  s_lam[[sf]] <- all_loadings$est.std[all_loadings$lhs == sf]
}

# Fehlervarianzen
error_vars <- ss[ss$op == "~~" & ss$lhs == ss$rhs &
                   ss$lhs %in% names(dat), "est.std"]

# ωh = (Σλ_g)² / [(Σλ_g)² + Σ(Σλ_s)² + Σθ]
sum_g_sq <- sum(g_lam)^2
sum_s_sq <- sum(sapply(s_lam, function(x) sum(x)^2))
sum_theta <- sum(error_vars)

omega_h <- sum_g_sq / (sum_g_sq + sum_s_sq + sum_theta)
cat("\nHierarchisches Omega (ωh):", round(omega_h, 3), "\n")

# ECV = Σ(λ_g²) / [Σ(λ_g²) + Σ(λ_s²)]
sum_g_lam_sq <- sum(g_lam^2)
sum_s_lam_sq <- sum(sapply(s_lam, function(x) sum(x^2)))
ECV <- sum_g_lam_sq / (sum_g_lam_sq + sum_s_lam_sq)
cat("ECV (Explained Common Variance):", round(ECV, 3), "\n")

# Spezifische ωs für jeden Gruppenfaktor
cat("\nSpezifische Omega (ωs) pro Faktor:\n")
for (sf in specific_factors) {
  items_sf <- all_loadings$rhs[all_loadings$lhs == sf]
  lam_g_sf <- g_lam[all_loadings$rhs[all_loadings$lhs == "g"] %in% items_sf]
  lam_s_sf <- s_lam[[sf]]
  theta_sf <- error_vars[match(items_sf, ss$lhs[ss$op == "~~" & ss$lhs == ss$rhs &
                                                   ss$lhs %in% names(dat)])]

  omega_s <- sum(lam_s_sf)^2 /
    (sum(lam_g_sf)^2 + sum(lam_s_sf)^2 + sum(theta_sf))
  cat(sprintf("  %s: ωs = %.3f\n", sf, omega_s))
}

# Interpretation (Rodriguez et al., 2016):
cat("\n=== Interpretationsleitfaden ===\n")
cat("ECV > .70 und ωh > .80 → g-Faktor dominiert\n")
cat("ECV < .50 → Gruppenfaktoren sind eigenständig interpretierbar\n")
cat("ωs > .30 → Gruppenfaktor hat reliable spezifische Varianz\n")

# Alternativ: semTools::bifactorIndices()
# Bifaktor-Indizes mit BifactorIndicesCalculator
if (requireNamespace("BifactorIndicesCalculator", quietly = TRUE)) {
  cat("\n=== BifactorIndicesCalculator::bifactorIndices() ===\n")
  bi <- BifactorIndicesCalculator::bifactorIndices(fit_bifac)
  print(bi)
} else {
  cat("Paket 'BifactorIndicesCalculator' nicht installiert.\n")
  cat("Installieren mit: install.packages('BifactorIndicesCalculator')\n")
  cat("→ Manuelle Berechnung oben verwenden.\n")
}

```
